category.scope_note: Air-source heat pumps for residential and commercial use, including split and packaged units up to 40 kW.

title.en: China-to-Turkey Air-source Heat Pump Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国空气源热泵进入土耳其：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國空氣源熱泵進入土耳其：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China air-source heat pump documentation against Turkey's CE marking framework (adopted EU directives via Presidential Decrees), TSE type-examination, TÜRKAK-accredited conformity assessment, ErP/Ecodesign energy efficiency obligations, F-Gas refrigerant controls, and pressure vessel requirements for the Turkish market.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国空气源热泵文件与土耳其CE标志框架（通过总统令采用欧盟指令）、TSE型式检验、TÜRKAK认可的符合性评定、ErP / 生态设计能效义务、F-Gas制冷剂管控及压力容器要求的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國空氣源熱泵文件與土耳其CE標誌框架（通過總統令採用歐盟指令）、TSE型式檢驗、TÜRKAK認可的符合性評定、ErP / 生態設計能效義務、F-Gas製冷劑管控及壓力容器要求的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, registered conformity assessment body decision, TSE or TÜRKAK filing, ErP calculation, F-Gas handling guidance, customs determination, installation approval, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, distributors, and installers should verify current CE directive scope, TSE type-examination routes, TÜRKAK accreditation requirements, ErP/Ecodesign obligations, Turkish F-Gas quota rules, and Turkish-language labelling requirements with qualified professionals before shipment, sale, or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、注册符合性评定机构决定、TSE或TÜRKAK申报、ErP计算、F-Gas处理指导、海关裁定、安装批准或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、经销商和安装方在出货、销售或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行CE指令适用范围、TSE型式检验路径、TÜRKAK认可要求、ErP/生态设计义务、土耳其F-Gas配额规则及土耳其语标签要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、註冊符合性評定機構決定、TSE或TÜRKAK申報、ErP計算、F-Gas處理指導、海關裁定、安裝批准或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、經銷商和安裝方在出貨、銷售或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行CE指令適用範圍、TSE型式檢驗路徑、TÜRKAK認可要求、ErP/生態設計義務、土耳其F-Gas配額規則及土耳其語標籤要求。

answer_first.en: CE marking (mandatory under Turkish Presidential Decrees adopting EU directives), ErP/Ecodesign energy label compliance (A+++ scale, EU-aligned), Turkish F-Gas refrigerant controls, and TÜRKAK-accredited conformity assessment are the major Turkey compliance gaps for Chinese air-source heat pumps. CCC is not recognised; CE marking is required.
answer_first.zh: CE标志（依据土耳其总统令采用欧盟指令强制要求）、ErP/生态设计能效标识合规（A+++级，与欧盟对齐）、土耳其F-Gas制冷剂管控，以及TÜRKAK认可的符合性评定，是中国空气源热泵进入土耳其的主要合规差距。CCC不被认可；CE标志为必须。
answer_first.zht: CE標誌（依據土耳其總統令採用歐盟指令強制要求）、ErP/生態設計能效標識合規（A+++級，與歐盟對齊）、土耳其F-Gas製冷劑管控，以及TÜRKAK認可的符合性評定，是中國空氣源熱泵進入土耳其的主要合規差距。CCC不被認可；CE標誌為必須。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: annual or upon major regulatory change
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true.
